title: should auto-pick FTS column on first search with no prior selection
verifies: FTS column (message or log) is auto-picked and visible in the results table when no prior field selection exists

title: should clear FTS default when user toggles a different field
verifies: adding a user-chosen field from the sidebar clears the FTS auto-pick and the user field persists across subsequent searches

title: should re-resolve FTS default on subsequent searches
verifies: the FTS default column is re-evaluated (re-resolved) on each new search and remains as a system pick rather than a persisted preference

title: should reset clear FTS default and re-resolve on new search
verifies: clicking Reset drops the auto-picked FTS column, and running a new search re-triggers the auto-pick from scratch

title: should not apply FTS default in SQL mode
verifies: toggling SQL mode ON drops the FTS auto-pick and no FTS column is injected into SQL-authored query results

title: should re-resolve FTS default after closing column and re-running search
verifies: closing the auto-picked column via the X button removes it, and the next search re-resolves the FTS default as a fresh system pick

title: should not inject FTS default when user already has pinned fields
verifies: when user has already pinned fields (isFtsDefaultColumn=false with non-empty selectedFields), the FTS default is not injected on subsequent searches
